rule_metadata.name: general_win_dll_golang_socks
rule_metadata.author: paloaltonetworks
rule_metadata.description: Highly suspicious GO DLL with proxy communication capabilities

rules.rule_text:
import "pe"

rule general_win_dll_golang_socks
{
	meta:
		author = "paloaltonetworks"
		date = "2022-03-13"
		description = "Highly suspicious GO DLL with proxy communication capabilities"
		reference = "https://unit42.paloaltonetworks.com/popping-eagle-malware/"

	condition:
		general_win_golang_socks and ( pe.characteristics & pe.DLL ) and pe.is_dll ( )
}
